<!-- Generated by ArcKit /arckit:pages -->
# arckit-test-project-v17-fuel-prices

> Enterprise architecture governance artifacts for `arckit-test-project-v17-fuel-prices`, generated with [ArcKit](https://arckit.org) 4.7.1. This repository contains structured documentation — requirements, stakeholders, risk registers, business cases, architecture decisions, diagrams, data models, and vendor evaluations — using ArcKit's template-driven workflow and versioned document IDs (`ARC-NNN-TYPE-vX.Y`).

ArcKit maintains a traceability chain: Stakeholders → Goals → Requirements (BR/FR/NFR/INT/DR) → Data Model → Components → User Stories. Every document follows a standard Document Control header and lives under `projects/NNN-name/` with multi-instance types (ADRs, diagrams, Wardley maps, research, data contracts) nested in typed subdirectories.

## Documentation site

- [Dashboard and document viewer](./index.html): Interactive web UI with KPI dashboard, category charts, governance checklist, sidebar navigation, and Mermaid diagram rendering.
- [Manifest](./manifest.json): Machine-readable JSON index of every artifact, guide, and project in this repository.

## Global artifacts

- [Architecture Principles](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/tractorjuice/arckit-test-project-v17-fuel-prices/main/projects/000-global/ARC-000-PRIN-v1.0.md): Architecture · `ARC-000-PRIN-v1.0`.

## DDaT role guides

- [Business Analyst](./guides/roles/business-analyst.md): Product and Delivery · 4 commands.
- [Business Architect](./guides/roles/business-architect.md): Architecture · 5 commands.
- [CDO (Chief Data Officer)](./guides/roles/cdo.md): Chief Digital and Data · 4 commands.
- [CISO (Chief Information Security Officer)](./guides/roles/ciso.md): Chief Digital and Data · 5 commands.
- [CTO / CDIO](./guides/roles/cto-cdio.md): Chief Digital and Data · 5 commands.
- [Data Architect](./guides/roles/data-architect.md): Architecture · 4 commands.
- [Data Governance Manager](./guides/roles/data-governance-manager.md): Data · 4 commands.
- [Delivery Manager](./guides/roles/delivery-manager.md): Product and Delivery · 6 commands.
- [DevOps Engineer](./guides/roles/devops-engineer.md): Software Development · 3 commands.
- [Enterprise Architect](./guides/roles/enterprise-architect.md): Architecture · 12 commands.
- [IT Service Manager](./guides/roles/it-service-manager.md): IT Operations · 3 commands.
- [Network Architect](./guides/roles/network-architect.md): Architecture · 3 commands.
- [Performance Analyst](./guides/roles/performance-analyst.md): Data · 4 commands.
- [Product Manager](./guides/roles/product-manager.md): Product and Delivery · 5 commands.
- [Security Architect](./guides/roles/security-architect.md): Architecture · 5 commands.
- [Service Owner](./guides/roles/service-owner.md): Product and Delivery · 3 commands.
- [Solution Architect](./guides/roles/solution-architect.md): Architecture · 10 commands.
- [Technical Architect](./guides/roles/technical-architect.md): Architecture · 5 commands.

## Optional

- [Source repository](https://github.com/tractorjuice/arckit-test-project-v17-fuel-prices): GitHub repo with full artifact history.
- [ArcKit project site](https://arckit.org): Command reference, guides, and distribution packages.
- [ArcKit on GitHub](https://github.com/tractorjuice/arc-kit): Plugin source, issues, and releases.
- [Uk Fuel Price Transparency Service — Fuel Finder for drivers_ Factsheet - GOV.UK.pdf](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/tractorjuice/arckit-test-project-v17-fuel-prices/main/projects/001-uk-fuel-price-transparency-service/external/Fuel Finder for drivers_ Factsheet - GOV.UK.pdf): External reference (pdf).
- [Uk Fuel Price Transparency Service — UpdatedFuelPrice-1775466000049.csv](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/tractorjuice/arckit-test-project-v17-fuel-prices/main/projects/001-uk-fuel-price-transparency-service/external/UpdatedFuelPrice-1775466000049.csv): External reference (csv).
